violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No quat test strips at the time of the inspection

Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Observed ground pork in freezer labeled "Not For Resale". Manager stated it was purchased from a local Hutterite Colony. It was not USDA inspected.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handles of scoops in flour bins.
